Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Aegis – open-source FPGA silicon 86 upvotes, 8 comments
  2. OpenScreen is an open-source alternative to Screen Studio 389 upvotes, 68 comments
  3. Iguanaworks has closed and our products are no longer sold 64 upvotes, 7 comments
  4. Show HN: A game where you build a GPU 856 upvotes, 171 comments
  5. Eight years of wanting, three months of building with AI 115 upvotes, 20 comments
  6. Scientists Figured Out How Eels Reproduce (2022) 70 upvotes, 11 comments
  7. Microsoft terms say Copilot is for entertainment purposes only, not serious use 13 upvotes, 0 comments
  8. Zml-smi: universal monitoring tool for GPUs, TPUs and NPUs 69 upvotes, 11 comments
  9. Show HN: OsintRadar – Curated directory for osint tools 41 upvotes, 5 comments
  10. Someone at BrowserStack Is Leaking Users' Email Address 251 upvotes, 65 comments
  11. Rubysyn: Clarifying Ruby's Syntax and Semantics 67 upvotes, 14 comments
  12. LLM Wiki – example of an "idea file" 253 upvotes, 77 comments
  13. Introduction to Computer Music (2009) [pdf] 194 upvotes, 60 comments
  14. Baby's Second Garbage Collector 9 upvotes, 0 comments
  15. Phone-free bars and restaurants on the rise across the U.S. 8 upvotes, 0 comments
  16. Shared mutable state in Rust (2022) 26 upvotes, 5 comments
  17. How many products does Microsoft have named 'Copilot'? 745 upvotes, 352 comments
  18. Friendica – A Decentralized Social Network 55 upvotes, 18 comments
  19. My Google Workspace account suspension 176 upvotes, 75 comments
  20. Common drug tests lead to tens of thousands wrongful arrests a year 73 upvotes, 31 comments
  21. Lisette a little language inspired by Rust that compiles to Go 182 upvotes, 92 comments
  22. Finnish sauna heat exposure induces stronger immune cell than cytokine responses 135 upvotes, 67 comments
  23. Artemis II crew see first glimpse of far side of Moon [video] 65 upvotes, 31 comments
  24. A Claude Code skill that makes Claude talk like a caveman, cutting token use 332 upvotes, 207 comments
  25. StackOverflow: Retiring the Beta Site 12 upvotes, 3 comments
  26. The threat is comfortable drift toward not understanding what you're doing 507 upvotes, 368 comments
  27. SPF/PC v4 for MS-DOS, FreeDOS, x86 11 upvotes, 3 comments
  28. Japanese, French and Omani Vessels Cross Strait of Hormuz 72 upvotes, 46 comments
  29. German implementation of eIDAS will require an Apple/Google account to function 451 upvotes, 399 comments
  30. Hightouch (YC S19) Is Hiring 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 12:00am, 6 April 2026. Source here.
